items.title: Closeout helper hardening
items.summary: Harden local closeout helpers around proof summaries, final git state capture, and manual review wording without changing app behavior.
items.next_action: Draft a phase prompt for closeout helper hardening using fake-only proof outputs.

items.title: Fake redaction metadata depth
items.summary: Expand synthetic redaction metadata fixtures and tests while keeping all data fictional and GitHub-safe.
items.next_action: Plan fake metadata categories and acceptance checks before implementation.

items.title: Citation QA fixtures
items.summary: Add fake citation QA fixtures that stress authority hierarchy, no-answer handling, and version metadata without changing answer content.
items.next_action: Identify fake fixture cases and expected citation classes.

items.title: Docs release pack
items.model: Claude closeout review after Codex validation
items.summary: Prepare a GitHub-safe docs release pack from existing fake-only state, validation logs, and proof summaries.
items.next_action: Collect current fake-only release notes and closeout summaries for review.

items.title: Real-doc pilot PLAN ONLY
items.model: Claude planning review with Codex validation
items.summary: Planning-only pilot outline for future real-document handling boundaries; no reads, copying, OCR, import, indexing, or private-vault inspection.
items.next_action: Write a planning-only prompt that re-states every real-document boundary before any future approval.

history.note: Seeded planning-only backlog item; no real documents are approved.
